title: Junior Business Development Manager at Indiabulls Real Estate

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Indiabulls Real Estate
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Indiabulls Real Estate in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Indiabulls Real Estate:
Indiabulls Real Estate is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indiabulls Real Estate!
